prompt: A realistic Japanese ukiyo-e print of Mount Fuji with cherry blossoms
prompt_refined: Generate a single image, styled as a traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print, heavily inspired by the composition and aesthetic of image 1. The scene should prominently feature Mount Fuji in the distant background, its peak rising above a tranquil body of water that extends across the middle left of the frame. The foreground and mid-ground are dominated by lush, blooming cherry blossom trees, their soft pink flowers creating a vibrant contrast against the blue sky and green landscape. On the lower right, depict subtle elements of human presence, such as a few traditional village buildings or small figures, rendered with the characteristic bold outlines and flat, vibrant colors typical of ukiyo-e art.
objects: Mount Fuji in the distant background
Tranquil body of water in the middle left
Blooming cherry blossom trees in the foreground and mid-ground
Traditional village buildings on the lower right
Small human figures on the lower right
